body.title: Granny: cc_dispatch_fn spawns CC instance via tmux
body.result: _launch_cc_instance added — Granny now spawns 'claude -p /sprint-ticket T-xxx' in tmux session cc-{ticket_id}
body.description:
cc_dispatch_fn currently marks in_progress + posts GRANNY_DISPATCH but does not launch CC. Add _launch_cc_instance(ticket_id) that spawns `claude -p /sprint-ticket T-xxx` in a named tmux session (cc-{ticket_id}) from the UU repo root. Prevents double-launch by checking tmux has-session first. Best-effort — launch failure logs a warning but does not block dispatch.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py, tests/test_granny_dispatch.py
**Design rules:** no-env-var-required; best-effort launch never blocks dispatch return value
**Scope boundary:** IN — launch CC for worker=claude tickets; OUT — no session lifecycle management, no output capture
**Test plan:** mock subprocess.Popen; assert called with tmux new-session + claude args; assert duplicate-session guard calls tmux has-session first
